market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Free Parking, 5‑min to City Centre – 3BR Home £136
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your perfect city‑break base – a spacious three‑bedroom, two‑bathroom entire home that comfortably sleeps four guests. Located just five minutes from the city centre, this modern house offers the convenience of free on‑site parking, making arrivals hassle‑free. Every night you’ll enjoy a £136 rate, which is 12% lower than the local median of £154.60, yet the property already boasts an impressive 80.4% occupancy over the next 90 days – a testament to its appeal.  

Inside, you’ll find four comfortable beds across three well‑appointed rooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and a bright living area ideal for relaxing after a day of exploring. The two clean, contemporary bathrooms ensure no morning queues. With a 5‑star rating from 128 guests, past visitors praise the spot‑on location, the value for money, and the smooth check‑in experience.  

While we’re not a Superhost yet, our dedication to guest satisfaction is evident in every detail. Whether you’re visiting for business, family, or leisure, the combination of low price, prime location, and free parking makes this home an unbeatable choice. Book now and experience the city at a fraction of the typical cost, with all the comforts of home waiting for you.
top_amenity_gaps: Entertainment options such as streaming TV or games
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use an exterior shot that clearly shows the free parking space as the cover photo, followed by bright images of the living room and master bedroom to convey space and comfort.
key_diagnosis: Add a detailed amenities list that highlights free parking, outdoor space, and entertainment options – this aligns with high‑value categories and leverages the fact your nightly rate (£136) is 12% below the cohort median (£154.60).

Replace the empty description with a compelling 200‑300 word narrative that repeats the 5‑star rating, 128 reviews, 80.4% occupancy (vs. market 47.8%), and the 5‑minute proximity to the city centre to boost SEO and guest confidence.

Rewrite the title to stay under 50 characters, lead with the strongest differentiator (free parking & price advantage), and include a location cue – for example: “Free Parking, 5‑min to City Centre – 3BR Home £136”.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your home is priced £18 (12%) below the city median yet already enjoys 80% occupancy—there’s untapped revenue you could capture with a sharper title and highlighted amenities.
